name: xau_bb_rsi_meanrev_m15
hypothesis: On XAUUSD M15, when price closes outside Bollinger(20,2.0) with RSI(7) extreme (<10 long / >90 short) during active London/NY sessions and BB width is above its 30th percentile, price mean-reverts toward the middle band within 30 bars more often than not, yielding PF>=2.0.

entry.long: close < lower_bb(20,2.0) AND rsi(7) < 10 AND prev_bar_not_entered AND cooldown_bars>=3
entry.short: close > upper_bb(20,2.0) AND rsi(7) > 90 AND prev_bar_not_entered AND cooldown_bars>=3

exit.tp: opposite bollinger band (middle_bb fallback if price touches mid before 10 bars)
